meta.name: WEMWBS Warwick-Edinburgh Mental Well-Being Scale
meta.description: The WEMWBS is a 14-item scale measuring positive mental well-being, covering subjective well-being and psychological functioning.
meta.author: Tennant et al. (2007)
meta.reference: Tennant R, et al. The Warwick-Edinburgh Mental Well-being Scale (WEMWBS). Health Qual Life Outcomes. 2007;5:63.
meta.instruction: Below are some statements about feelings and thoughts. Please select the option that best describes your experience over the past 2 weeks.

questions.text: I have been feeling optimistic about the future
I have been feeling interested in other people
I have had energy to spare
I have been dealing with problems well
I have been feeling good about myself
I have been feeling close to other people
I have been able to make up my own mind about things
I have been interested in new things

ranges.label: Very Low Well-Being
ranges.description: Your mental well-being score is very low. This indicates that your current sense of well-being and life satisfaction is relatively low. Focusing on self-care and lifestyle adjustments may be beneficial.
suggestions: Try doing one fulfilling activity each day

ranges.label: Below Average
ranges.description: Your mental well-being is below average. Your well-being is at a moderate level. Increasing positive experiences and social connections may help improve your overall sense of fulfillment.
suggestions: Increase the frequency of positive social activities

ranges.label: Average
ranges.description: Your mental well-being is average. This level reflects a generally positive psychological state, where you can experience meaning and satisfaction in most aspects of life.
suggestions: Share your experiences and positive feelings with others

ranges.label: Above Average
ranges.description: Your mental well-being is above average. Your well-being and positive experiences are at a high level, reflecting strong psychological health and life adaptation.
suggestions: Keep up the habits and activities that bring you happiness
Share your positive experiences with others
